acceptance.proof: The complete README accepted at 9cd21a1 is archived byte-for-byte at its pinned SHA-256; changed, missing, duplicated, or substituted archive bytes fail closed.
The concise README names the exact current bounded contract and eight selected-but-run-disabled capability families without adding runtime, compatibility, activation, or authority claims.

Required authoritative architecture, compatibility, provenance, validation, corpus, oracle, licensing, supply-chain, project-workflow, fixture, AGENTS, and history routes occur exactly once; damaged omissions and unsafe language fail closed.
Complete current and pinned historical owner validation passes with historical checker bytes, current-gate manifests, CI, and validation semantics unchanged.
Public-safe routing, exact path scope, additive lifecycle history, no-device scope, and normal compact-state projection pass.

non_scope: Editing AGENTS or authoritative architecture, compatibility, provenance, validation, corpus, oracle, licensing, supply-chain, fixture, or project-workflow content.

document.objective: Archive the complete accepted README byte-for-byte and replace it with a concise public-safe router for current bounded capabilities and authoritative project documents, backed by an exact marker inventory and damaged-omission tests.

A concise README that distinguishes local contracts, explicitly activated candidate runtime capabilities, evidence limits, and non-authority boundaries while routing to every authoritative document family.
